video_prompt: The video shows a man sitting on a rock near a campfire, holding a glass bottle and drinking from it. The setting appears to be outdoors, possibly in a forest or camping area. The man is wearing a white t-shirt with a graphic design, black shorts, and black sneakers. The flames of the campfire are flickering, and the man appears to be enjoying the moment. The background includes a backpack and some rocks around the fire. The ambient sound includes the crackling of the campfire and the man drinking from the bottle.
audio_prompt: Sizzling and crackling are present, and thumping occurs
